remaining_params.SpellDescription: Look at the top six cards of your library. You may put a creature card with mana value 3 or less from among them onto the battlefield, then conjure a duplicate of that card onto the battlefield. The duplicate perpetually has base power and toughness 1/1. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.
